title: TripSync — shared trip calendar, no login
h1: Paste a trip itinerary, get a shared day-by-day calendar — no app, no login
aboveFoldText: Paste a trip itinerary, get a shared day-by-day calendar — no app, no login
One link, open on any phone. Add individual events to Google Calendar or download the whole trip as a .ics file for any calendar app.
Anyone with the link can view and edit — share only with your travel companions. No account or email required.
